prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南大学为211工程、 双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第68名→2026年第61名，近年排名稳步提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉 及校园外卖管理争议等中性偏负面事件；抖音热度排名第38位（较热），综合热度约120万，短视频平台曝光度较高，报考关注度处于中等偏上水平；教育学A、 心理学A、马克思主义理论A-，师范类学科实力突出，与该校师范特色一致，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科 专业社会热度持续偏热；辽宁省2026年考生总数约20万人（较2025年约19.97万基本持平），物理类考生按近年占比约71.8%估算约14.36万人，考生规模稳定；西南大学位于重庆（西南地区），辽宁省为东北省份，跨省就读存在一定地域偏好差异；该校在辽宁招生占比近年约2.3%–3.2%，属外省中等规模 招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16970名、2026年扩招约28.6%（位次数字增大方向）、软科排名持续上升（吸引力增强方向）、抖音热度较热（竞争关注度中等偏上 ）等因素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约19679名，区间19179–20179名。扩招是位次后移的主要驱动因素，学校排名上升部分抵消了扩招 带来的位次后移幅度。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 9467 → 10190 → 23175 → 10639 → 16970, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to changes in major structure (addition of low-score majors such as Sericulture), the ranking dropped sharply to 23175, rebounded to 10639 in 2024, and then shifted back to 16970 in 2025. The overall trend in recent two years is a backward shift, with a baseline of about 16970 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for Physics Category was 5 students in 2021, 7 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 7 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 9 students, an expansion of about 28.6% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large increase, theoretically easing competition slightly and tending to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science University Rankings has been rising steadily, from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving neutral to negative incidents such as campus food delivery management disputes. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 38th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.2 million, indicating high exposure on short video platforms and moderate to high application attention. It has strong disciplines in Education (A), Psychology (A), and Marxist Theory (A-), highlighting its normal university characteristics, which attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be socially popular. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Liaoning Province is about 200,000 (roughly the same as 2025's 199,700), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 143,600 based on the recent proportion of about 71.8%, indicating a stable candidate pool. Southwest University is located in Chongqing (Southwest region), while Liaoning Province is in the Northeast, so cross-province enrollment involves certain regional preference differences. The university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning in recent years is about 2.3%–3.2%, representing a medium-scale enrollment from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16970, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 28.6% (tending to increase the ranking number), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (tending to increase attractiveness), and the relatively hot Douyin popularity (moderate to high competition attention), the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 19679, with a range of 19179–20179. The enrollment expansion is the main driver of the backward shift in ranking, while the rise in university ranking partially offsets the extent of the backward shift caused by the expansion.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 19179–20179, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 19000), one can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Artificial Intelligence and Economics Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 20000 or above), one should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1077 → 1543 → 2093 → 1960 → 2173, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The best ranking was in 2021 (1077), and it has moved backward year by year since then. The baseline for 2025 is about 2173, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1096 over the past 5 years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province was 2 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 2 in 2024, and 2 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 3, a 50% expansion compared to 2025, which theoretically significantly eases competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science University Rankings has been steadily rising, from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving neutral to negative incidents such as campus food delivery management disputes. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 38th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.2 million, indicating high exposure on short video platforms and moderate to high application attention. It has strong disciplines in Education (A), Psychology (A), and Marxist Theory (A-), with outstanding normal (teacher training) disciplines closely related to its enrollment majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and Chinese International Education, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Chinese Language/Literature majors is recommended as relatively hot, while Normal/Education majors are in a wait-and-see differentiation. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 56,400 based on the recent proportion of about 28.2%, roughly the same as in 2025 (56,300). Southwest University is located in Chongqing (Southwest China), while Liaoning Province is in the Northeast, so there are certain regional preference differences for cross-province study. The university enrolls very few students in History Category in Liaoning (2–5), making it a small-scale enrollment, and rankings are easily affected by the application decisions of a few high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2173, the 50% enrollment expansion in 2026 (direction of increasing ranking number), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (direction of increasing attractiveness), and the relatively hot popularity of Chinese Language and Literature majors (direction of intensifying competition), the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 2775, with a range of 2275–3275. The enrollment expansion is the main driver for the backward shift in ranking, but the relatively hot popularity of advantageous majors like Chinese Language and Literature and the rise in university ranking partially offset the extent of the backward shift caused by the expansion.
